steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content: Because triangle $DEF$ is similar to triangle $PQR$, corresponding angles are equal. The correspondence gives angle $F$ equal to angle $R$.

steps.title: Find the remaining angle
steps.content:
The angles in triangle $DEF$ sum to $180^\circ$.
$$47^\circ+29^\circ+F=180^\circ$$
$$F=180^\circ-76^\circ=104^\circ$$
Thus angle $R$ has the same measure. The answer is 104.
